name: Open Promenade

notes:
Note:
Man may turn square to the lady in step 3, to end backing DC. Footwork for man would then be IE BH and for the lady IE of foot.

steps.action: to side in PP along LOD, pointing DW
forward and across in PP and CBMP along LOD, pointing DW
to side in PP along LOD, pointing DC
comments: R Toe in line with LF. Sometimes it is ok to step slightly to side a bit to give it enough room for inside legs to pass through.

steps.action: forward and across in PP and CBMP along LOD, pointing DC
